title: Assertion Trigger on FULL OUTER JOIN with more than two BETWEEN clauses
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER, y INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b INTEGER);

SELECT *
 FROM
 t1
 FULL OUTER JOIN
 t2
 ON
 x BETWEEN a AND b OR
 y BETWEEN a AND b;

SELECT *
 FROM
 t1
 FULL OUTER JOIN
 t2
 ON
 x BETWEEN a AND b OR
 y BETWEEN a AND b OR
 a BETWEEN x AND y;
key_bug_features: FULL OUTER JOIN with multiple BETWEEN clauses
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER, y INTEGER CHECK (x >= 0 AND y >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b INTEGER DEFAULT 10);
INSERT INTO t1(x, y) VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4), (5, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 FULL OUTER JOIN t2 ON x BETWEEN a AND b OR y BETWEEN a AND b OR a BETWEEN x AND y;
